cells.value: Remove 7 screws from the bottom plate
cells.text: Remove 7 screws from the bottom plate

cells.value: Remove 7 fixing screws from the back panel and detach the back panel
cells.text: Remove 7 fixing screws from the back panel and detach the back panel

cells.value: Disconnect the collection button and power button switch cables
cells.text: Disconnect the collection button and power button switch cables

cells.value: Remove 4 hex screws from the front panel, use a blade to cut the sticker on the rotating disk, remove 3 screws from the rotating disk, and detach the rotating disk and screen cover
cells.text: Remove 4 hex screws from the front panel, use a blade to cut the sticker on the rotating disk, remove 3 screws from the rotating disk, and detach the rotating disk and screen cover

cells.value: Remove 4 fixing screws from the front panel to take off the casing (after removing the casing, secure the four corners of the screen with tape to prevent it from falling off)
cells.text: Remove 4 fixing screws from the front panel to take off the casing (after removing the casing, secure the four corners of the screen with tape to prevent it from falling off)

cells.value: Reassemble the device by reversing the disassembly steps
cells.text: Reassemble the device by reversing the disassembly steps

cells.value: IAS-3120 Finished Product Disassembly and Assembly
cells.text: IAS-3120 Finished Product Disassembly and Assembly
